rules.note: Everything here is a dry-run/planning-only posture until a worker lane is explicitly wired to real execution.

tools.intended_role: Local workflow automation — draft and stage multi-step workflows before anything runs for real.
tools.next_phase: Owner reviews drafted workflow JSON manually before any execution is enabled.

tools.intended_role: Acceptance-criteria and implementation-boundary proposals before code changes land.
tools.next_phase: Owner reviews and applies proposals by hand.

tools.intended_role: Operating standards reference for worker handoffs, constraints, and behavior.
tools.next_phase: Documentation-only for now — no runtime integration planned yet.

tools.intended_role: Semantic code navigation / code map for worker context.
tools.next_phase: Generate a read-only code map profile on explicit request only.

tools.intended_role: Squad / multi-agent planning vocabulary for future coordinated work.
tools.next_phase: Stays quarantined until a real multi-agent runtime decision is made.

tools.intended_role: Allowlisted research fetch lane for Phantom AI, gated behind Hermes controls.
tools.next_phase: Ship a strict domain allowlist plus Hermes-gated approval before any live fetch.
